mapper.insert: insert into tbl_estimation ( requester_id, receiver_id, product_id, title, content, location, deadline, status ) values ( #{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{location}, #{deadLine}, cast(#{status} as estimation_status) )
mapper.select: select e.id, e.requester_id, e.receiver_id, e.product_id, e.title, e.content, e.location, e.deadline as deadLine, e.status, requester.member_email as requesterEmail, receiver.member_email as receiverEmail, e.created_datetime as createdDateTime, e.updated_datetime as updatedDateTime from tbl_estimation e join tbl_member requester on e.requester_id = requester.id left join tbl_member receiver on e.receiver_id = receiver.id where e.receiver_id = #{receiverId} order by e.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select e.id, e.requester_id, e.receiver_id, e.product_id, e.title, e.content, e.location, e.deadline as deadLine, e.status, requester.member_email as requesterEmail, receiver.member_email as receiverEmail, e.created_datetime as createdDateTime, e.updated_datetime as updatedDateTime from tbl_estimation e join tbl_member requester on e.requester_id = requester.id left join tbl_member receiver on e.receiver_id = receiver.id where e.requester_id = #{requesterId} order by e.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select e.id, e.requester_id, e.receiver_id, e.product_id, e.title, e.content, e.location, e.deadline as deadLine, e.status, requester.member_email as requesterEmail, receiver.member_email as receiverEmail, e.created_datetime as createdDateTime, e.updated_datetime as updatedDateTime from tbl_estimation e join tbl_member requester on e.requester_id = requester.id left join tbl_member receiver on e.receiver_id = receiver.id where e.id = #{id}
select id, tag_name, created_datetime as createdDateTime from tbl_estimation_tag where tag_name = #{tagName}

select t.id, t.tag_name, t.created_datetime as createdDateTime from tbl_estimation_tag t join tbl_estimation_tag_rel tr on t.id = tr.tag_id where tr.estimation_id = #{estimationId} order by t.tag_name
